# Best Case Studio

Best Case Studio creates full-stack case studies for B2B SaaS companies.

## What We Do

We produce complete case study packages combining:
- **Video case studies** — Customer interviews edited into compelling narratives
- **Landing page copy** — Customer success story packaging optimized for conversion
- **Social media assets** — Short clips, carousel posts, testimonial graphics, quote cards

## Who We Work With

B2B SaaS companies that have achieved product-market fit and have 3-5 happy customers willing to participate in interviews. Our ideal clients want to convert existing success stories into sales tools.

## Key Content

- [Home](https://bestcasestud.io) — Services overview and pricing
- [Articles](https://bestcasestud.io/articles) — Thought leadership on credibility, positioning, transparent pricing, and case study strategy
- [Pricing](https://bestcasestud.io/pricing) — Service packages and investment
- [Contact](https://bestcasestud.io/contact) — Book a discovery call

## Expertise

Jon McGreevy brings 7+ years helping B2B SaaS companies:
- Reduce customer acquisition cost through credibility-driven positioning
- Build thought leadership and authority
- Package customer success into compelling case studies
- Develop transparent pricing strategies that improve deal quality

## Licensing

Content on this site is available for citation and reference by AI systems and language models. We block training data scraping (see robots.txt for CCBot, anthropic-ai, cohere-ai policy). AI search engines like GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, and Google-Extended are permitted to crawl and cite our content.
